title: Christmas Santa's Sack Childrens Presents Large Brown Calico Bag Snowman Design
features: PERFECT FOR CHRISTMAS MORNING - Magical Christmas Santa's Sack to put in all your child's presents. Store them in the sack next to the tree on Christmas Eve all ready for opening the presents on Christmas morning
FUN AND TRADITIONAL FESTIVE DESIGNS - Festive Snowman design on the front riding a sleigh carrying a present
PREMIUM QUALITY - Traditional brown calico cotton blend style bag for great durability, securely tied with a red & white stripped string closure
ENJOY A SUSTAINABLE CHRISTMAS: These gift sacks can re-used time and time again and come in fully recyclable packaging
SPACE FOR LOTS OF GIFTS - Plenty of room for lots of toys. Approx size: 70 x 50cm
description: Get ready for a magical Christmas with our Snowman Design Calico Christmas Santa Sack! Made with high-quality and durable calico fabric, this Santa sack features an adorable snowy snowman design that will delight children and adults alike. Spacious and roomy interior for you to fill with lots of presents and goodies for your loved ones. Sturdy drawstring closure ensures that nothing falls out and keeps the surprises inside until it's time to unwrap.
